topWPAPlays.description: Brayan Rocchio singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Kyle Manzardo scores. Daniel Schneemann scores. Travis Bazzana to 3rd.
Bryce Teodosio pops out softly to first baseman Kyle Manzardo in foul territory.
Daniel Schneemann singles on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Rhys Hoskins scores. Kyle Manzardo scores. David Fry to 3rd.
David Fry walks. Chase DeLauter scores. Rhys Hoskins to 3rd. Kyle Manzardo to 2nd.
Daniel Schneemann grounds into a force out, third baseman Vaughn Grissom to shortstop Zach Neto. Kyle Manzardo to 3rd. David Fry out at 2nd. Daniel Schneemann to 1st.
Coby Mayo homers (4) on a fly ball to left field. Adley Rutschman scores. Tyler O'Neill scores.
Ben Rice homers (13) on a fly ball to left center field. Trent Grisham scores.
Orioles challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: José Caballero caught stealing 2nd base, catcher Adley Rutschman to second baseman Blaze Alexander.
Jazz Chisholm Jr. called out on strikes.
Adley Rutschman singles on a ground ball to right fielder Aaron Judge.
Andrés Giménez homers (4) on a fly ball to right field. Kazuma Okamoto scores. Jesús Sánchez scores.
Richie Palacios singles on a ground ball to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Junior Caminero scores. Jake Fraley scores.
Taylor Walls triples (1) on a sharp line drive to center fielder Daulton Varsho. Hunter Feduccia scores.
Junior Caminero singles on a line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Chandler Simpson to 3rd.
Andrés Giménez homers (5) on a fly ball to right field. Myles Straw scores.
Josh Jung flies out to center fielder Jorge Barrosa.
Alejandro Osuna singles on a line drive to left fielder Lourdes Gurriel Jr.
Geraldo Perdomo doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Brandon Nimmo. Corbin Carroll scores.
Jake Burger grounds into a force out, shortstop Geraldo Perdomo to second baseman Ketel Marte. Alejandro Osuna out at 2nd. Jake Burger to 1st.
Brandon Nimmo strikes out on a foul tip.
Dominic Canzone singles on a line drive to left fielder Zach Cole. Randy Arozarena scores. Luke Raley to 2nd.
Cole Young singles on a ground ball to right fielder Cam Smith. Luke Raley scores. Dominic Canzone to 2nd.
Julio Rodríguez homers (7) on a fly ball to left field.
Isaac Paredes singles on a ground ball to left fielder Randy Arozarena, deflected by shortstop J.P. Crawford. Jose Altuve scores. Yordan Alvarez to 2nd.
Christian Walker walks.
Max Muncy homers (11) on a fly ball to left center field.
Willy Adames singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker. Luis Arraez scores. Casey Schmitt scores. Rafael Devers to 2nd.
Rafael Devers singles on a line drive to center fielder Andy Pages. Casey Schmitt to 3rd. Rafael Devers to 2nd.
Heliot Ramos doubles (11) on a ground ball to left fielder Teoscar Hernández. Casey Schmitt scores. Rafael Devers scores.
Rafael Devers walks. Jung Hoo Lee scores. Luis Arraez to 3rd. Casey Schmitt to 2nd.
